title: Westland Boost Slow Release Plant Food 750g
features: Instant nutrients and bio-stimulant will boost root growth
Targeted nitrogen feed will give lush green foliage
Slow release feed for 6-moth nutrient supply helps boost disease resistance
High potassium levels will promote flowering, fruit production and plant resilience
description: From the manufacturer Boost All Purpose 6 Month Plant Feed Granules Westland Boost All Purpose Multi-Action Granules deliver a powerful 4x multi-action formula designed to support your plants at every stage of growth. These nutrient-rich granules strengthen roots, encourage lush, greener foliage, and provide up to six months of controlled-release feeding for long-lasting plant health. The high potassium content promotes abundant blooms, fruits, and vegetables throughout the growing season, making it perfect for vibrant, thriving gardens. For best results, mix Boost All Purpose Multi-Action Granules into Boost All Purpose Compost when planting, and continue regular feeding with Boost All Purpose Liquid Plant Feed to enjoy up to 4x more blooms* all summer long. *bedding plants vs. unfed Key Benefits 4x Multi-action feed – stronger roots, greener foliage, healthier plants and more blooms 6 month controlled release feed Readily available nutrients and root growth stimulants Use in pots, baskets and flower beds for bedding plants Use as part of the Boost Growing System Boost All Purpose 6 Month Plant Feed Granules 4x Multi-action feed 1. Stronger Roots The granules are packed with instant-release nutrients and a root growth stimulant to help plants establish stronger, deeper root systems. This ensures they absorb water and nutrients more efficiently, setting the stage for long-term health and vitality. 2. Greener Foliage Formulated with targeted nitrogen, Boost granules promote lush, green foliage. 3. Healthier Plants One application of these granules provides up to 6 months of steady, slow-release feed. This ongoing nutrient supply boosts overall plant health and resilience, helping to ward off diseases and ensure plants stay strong and flourishing all season. 4. More Blooms Contains high potassium feed for more blooms and higher fruit yields. How to use For pots, tubs and hanging baskets use 30g per 30cm/12″ container For bedding plants use 20g per 10L compost If sprinkling over the soil surface use 50g per m2 For best results, dig into the soil and water in to activate the granules. One handful of granules is about 40g. Where to use Use Boost All Purpose 6 Month Plant Feed Granules in pots, baskets and flower beds for bedding plants. The Boost Growing System 1. Boost your containers with Boost All purpose compost that locks in moisture. 2. Work a handful of Boost All Purpose Multi-Action Granules for a season long boost of nutrients. 3. Feed regularly throughout the season with Boost All Purpose Liquid Plant Feed for 4x more blooms*, more fruits and vegetables guaranteed. *bedding plants vs. unfed
